name: Sweet Pickle Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Use fresh, firm, medium cucumbers.
2. Wash and cut into quarters.
3. Pour boiling water over the cucumber pieces and let stand overnight.
4. The next morning, pack the cucumber pieces solidly into clean jars.
5. Prepare the pickling solution by boiling together all ingredients for 5 minutes.
6. Carefully pour the hot solution over the cucumbers in the jars.
7. Place lids on the jars and seal tightly.
